system.powerDescription:
Misfortune and coincidence bend as you enforce tragedy onto the world. Select one of the following to take effect within a CAT+2 area around yourself. 

• Structures weaken and become prone to failure. Heavily damaged and decayed buildings will collapse entirely. 
• Locks click and side. All locks and passwords, both electronic and physical, will remain unlocked and open to access. 
• Safety is an illusion. Vehicle brakes, gun safeties, and similar mechanisms universally fail. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll while active.
